creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
So if you follow all the moves of this file, this patch will still apply.

However, it's unclear to me that this is a good idea to apply it. The maintainer sat on it for a while, suggesting that it wasn't good. There's no good explanation about why this is needed. and there appears to be no other complaints about this. Plus, this is a 'long tail' sound card at this point, being mostly legacy and the risk to breaking it might be high. Add to that at least one report of the patch not working.

I think we'd be better off just closing this.
